arts.ttl: Arne Slot already issued 'boring' response to Pep Guardiola's Man City title admission
arts.sum: Liverpool sit eight points clear of Manchester City at the top of the Premier League with Pep Guardiola's side facing the prospect of slipping out of title contention

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker sends Premier League title message to Liverpool as Man City star fears 'walk over'
arts.sum: Kyle Walker was guilty of some poor defending in Manchester City's 4-0 thrashing by Tottenham and after the game he warned his team-mates they could not repeat the same performance against Liverpool

arts.ttl: Southampton vs Liverpool - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot's side look to extend their lead at the top of the Premier League against rock-bottom Saints

arts.ttl: Southampton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Premier League leaders Liverpool make the trip to the South Coast this weekend to face bottom-of-the-table Southampton. Arne Slot’s side have a five-point cushion at the summit of the league, while the Saints are propping up the table with only four points from 11 matches. arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Southampton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool have the chance to open up an eight-point lead at the top of the Premier League when the Reds travel to Southampton on Sunday. Arne Slot’s side will hope to capitalise on a defeat for Manchester City and extend their advantage at St Mary’s. arts.ttl: The former Liverpool star whose son has been handed Wrexham trial as promotion ambition clear
arts.sum: Wrexham have taken Yassine Toure, the 18-year-old son of Premier League icon Kolo, on trial as they hunt for a third straight promotion in the EFL

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's 'boring' claim responds perfectly to Pep Guardiola's Man City title admission
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has no issue playing the "boring" role if it means the Reds beat an ailing Manchester City side to the Premier League title in his first season
